name: Chicken a La Roma Kate Dimler Xrmf90a
recipeIngredient: WHITE WINE TO REDUCE AND THICKEN) SAUTÉ
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions and minced garlic in margarine.
2. Add tomatoes, chicken, mushrooms, seasonings, and tomato sauce to thicken lightly.
3. Spread tomato sauce on the bottom of a 9x13 "pammed" pan (I like to spice up the tomato sauce with additional seasonings).
4. Layer ingredients as follows: noodles, tomato-chicken mixture, half of the cheese, bechamel sauce, noodles, tomato-chicken mixture, bechamel sauce, cheeses, ending with Parmesan.
5. Bake at 375°F for 35-45 minutes or until lightly browned and bubbly.
